name: Atlanta Golf & Social | West End
about: Atlanta Golf & Social is a public indoor golf club that combines Trackman simulator technology with a laid-back, casual bar vibe. It is Atlanta's first and only locally-owned indoor golf club with multiple neighborhood locations. The venue offers a modern interpretation of a country club, featuring state-of-the-art Trackman simulators and a full bar and food menu, making it much more than a neighborhood escape for the avid golfer. Access to unlimited golf is available at a variety of price points, with membership packages designed for frequent players to enjoy expanded access, exclusive perks, and incredible value.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman simulator technology for precise data-driven swing analysis
Laid-back, casual bar atmosphere combining golf with a social experience
Multiple membership tiers catering to different playing frequencies and budgets
PGA-certified instructors offering personalized, data-driven lessons
Flexible booking options for both members and non-members

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art Trackman simulators available in multiple bays

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, free club rentals are available for members.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: No, the venue offers a full bar and food menu available on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A standard 18-hole round typically takes about 1-2 hours depending on the group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Atlanta Golf & Social is a family-friendly venue where all skill levels are welcome.
